name: Container
description: Responsive max-width wrapper with consistent page padding.

api.name: Container
api.description: Responsive max-width wrapper with consistent page padding.

parameters.name: MaxWidth
parameters.description: Tailwind max-w-* size token (e.g. sm, lg, 4xl) applied as max-w-{MaxWidth}. Set to null/empty to render without a max width. Default: "lg".

parameters.name: Center
parameters.description: Horizontally centers the container within its parent via mx-auto. Default: true.

parameters.name: Padding
parameters.description: Tailwind spacing token applied as horizontal padding (px-{Padding}). Set to null/empty for no horizontal padding. Default: "4".

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root div.

examples.title: Different Max Widths
examples.code:
<Container MaxWidth="sm">Small container</Container>
<Container MaxWidth="md">Medium container</Container>
<Container MaxWidth="lg">Large container</Container>
<Container MaxWidth="xl">Extra large container</Container>

mdSummary:
# Container

Responsive max-width wrapper with consistent page padding.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Layout
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/container

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Container | MaxWidth | `string?` | `"lg"` | Tailwind max-w-* size token (e.g. sm, lg, 4xl) applied as max-w-{MaxWidth}. Set to null/empty to render without a max width. Default: "lg". |
| Container | Center | `bool` | `true` | Horizontally centers the container within its parent via mx-auto. Default: true. |
| Container | Padding | `string?` | `"4"` | Tailwind spacing token applied as horizontal padding (px-{Padding}). Set to null/empty for no horizontal padding. Default: "4". |
| Container | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The container's content. |
| Container | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root div. |
| Container | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root div. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (Container) — The container's content.

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<Container />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-foreground`

## Files
- `UI/Container/Container.razor`
